title: Durga and Kali Approach the Gathered Armies of Chanda and Munda: Scene from the Devi Mahatmya
description: Durga and Kali Approach the Gathered Armies of Chanda and Munda: Scene from the Devi Mahatmya — Purchase, The Research Institute of the Scripps Clinic Gift, in honor of Lita Annenberg Hazen and Arthur Ochs Sulzberger Gift, 1995
